prompt: A vintage political-propaganda-style poster collage on aged beige paper with a worn, slightly stained texture and torn-paper edges throughout. The composition is a bold vertical poster with a strong constructivist and Soviet-inspired graphic design, using only black, red, blue, yellow, and off-white. At the very top, centered in bold black sans-serif text, place the headline {argument name="headline text" default="Image generation with a point of view"}. In the center, reserve a large vertical rectangular area as the dominant focal block, slightly taller than wide, filled with a plain muted beige-to-taupe gradient like a blank poster insert. Around it, build a torn-paper photomontage from 4 visible collage zones: on the left, a red paper field with a black-and-white cutout of a person in a dark coat seen from behind or in profile, next to fragments of French poster text; at the top behind the central rectangle, a partial black-and-white face or head fragment peeking out; on the right, a blue paper field with a black-and-white Paris-like street scene including 1 tall ornate lamppost, old buildings, 1 car, and 1 walking man; at the bottom center, a yellow torn-paper field with a cropped black-and-white figure holding a newspaper, wearing a striped shirt. Add a vertical strip of black rectangular blocks near the upper right edge of the central rectangle, like cut graphic bars. At the bottom, place the main title in huge heavy condensed typography: {argument name="brand text" default="GPT Image"}, with "GPT" in black and "Image" in bright red. Beneath and to the right, add an enormous {argument name="version text" default="2.0"} in vivid blue. Below the left title area, add a rough horizontal black brushstroke underline. Centered near the bottom, in smaller black text, write {argument name="footer text" default="Coming soon"}. The overall look should feel like mid-20th-century avant-garde poster art, rough torn collage, distressed print, high contrast halftone photography, imperfect paper registration, and bold editorial typography.
translatedPrompt: 一张复古政治宣传风格的海报拼贴画，背景为陈旧的米色纸张，带有磨损、轻微污渍的质感，边缘呈现撕纸效果。整体构图为一张强烈的垂直海报，具有鲜明的构成主义和苏联风格设计，仅使用黑色、红色、蓝色、黄色和灰白色。在最上方，居中放置粗体黑色无衬线文本标题 {argument name="headline text" default="Image generation with a point of view"}。在中心位置，预留一个大的垂直矩形区域作为主要视觉焦点，长宽比略高，填充平淡的柔和米色至灰褐色渐变，如同空白的海报插页。围绕该区域，构建一个由 4 个可见拼贴区域组成的撕纸照片蒙太奇：左侧为红色纸面，配有身穿深色外套的人物背影或侧影的黑白剪纸，旁边是法语海报文本碎片；中央矩形后方顶部，露出部分黑白人脸或头部碎片；右侧为蓝色纸面，配有黑白巴黎街景，包括 1 根高大的装饰性路灯、古老建筑、1 辆汽车和 1 名行人；底部中央为黄色撕纸区域，配有手持报纸、身穿条纹衬衫的人物黑白剪影。在中央矩形右上边缘附近添加一条垂直的黑色矩形块条，如同剪切的图形条。在底部，放置巨大的粗体压缩字体主标题 {argument name="brand text" default="GPT Image"}，其中“GPT”为黑色，“Image”为亮红色。在下方右侧，添加一个巨大的蓝色 {argument name="version text" default="2.0"}。在左侧标题区域下方，添加一道粗糙的水平黑色笔触下划线。在底部附近居中位置，用较小的黑色文本书写 {argument name="footer text" default="Coming soon"}。整体外观应呈现 20 世纪中叶前卫海报艺术的质感，包括粗糙的撕纸拼贴、磨损的印刷效果、高对比度半色调摄影、不完美的纸张套印以及大胆的编辑排版。

breakdown.creativeCore: Constructivist GPT Image 2.0 海报：一款复古前卫风格的宣传海报，采用撕纸拼贴、粗体排版和受宣传画启发的设计，非常适合用于发布 AI 图像模型或创意活动。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: editorial, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
